generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TrajectoryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance ValidationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane position, swing angle, and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionLogsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Logs of trajectory execution for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metrics comparing measured vs simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ValidationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for virtual execution of crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane design"
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modeling tool for Arcadia architecture"
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusMonitoring, ValidationAlert
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectory
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane movements in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutput
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measured vs simulated trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates communication between physical and digital components via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmission
]

instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance OptimalTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated trajectory for controlling crane movements"
]

instance RealTimeStatusMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current status of crane operations for adjustments"
]

instance DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmission of data between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Logging of time-series data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationOutput : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation results of crane movements"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for hardware control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for crane system"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoController, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the motors and electromagnet for precise movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur in real-time with no specified sampling rate but described as 'continuous' for monitoring and validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture integrating physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) with digital services (DB, dashboard, trajectory gen, simulation, validation) connected via MQTT broker, all deployed on a single PC with Docker-managed services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion 360) and 'as operated' (real-time data during crane operation), with evolution tracked via DarTwin notation for lifecycle management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectory data; thresholds determine validity, with breaches triggering operator notifications via dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface uses Python to communicate with hardware controllers (specific protocol not detailed in document)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers managed via Docker Compose; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for application logic."
]
